storage.cacheHint: Clearing cache will not delete your imported practice videos.

permission.photosRationale: ReDance needs access to your photo library to import dance videos for practice.
permission.photosDeniedMessage: Photo library access is disabled. Please enable it in Settings to import videos.

privacy.title: Before You Continue
privacy.body:
ReDance collects anonymous usage data (such as feature interactions and session stats) to help improve the app. We do not collect personal information, your identity, or advertising identifiers (IDFA).

You can change this choice at any time in the Privacy Policy.
